title: Cheasty
content: [Cart 0](https://www.cheasty.org/cart). [Welcome](https://www.cheasty.org/)[Volunteer](https://www.cheasty.org/volunteer). [![Image 5: Cheasty](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5d5345ed2ee2de0001da5876/1565738858948-W3TMKL9NOV3C3DT6X3CN/CHEASTY+TRAILS+AND+BIKE+PARK.png)](https://www.cheasty.org/). [Cart 0](https://www.cheasty.org/cart). We work on forest restoration, trail building, and maintenance to create a safe and accessible place for the community. In partnership with with Seattle Parks and Recreation, we’re working together on the Cheasty Mt. Bike Pilot project to evaluate mountain biking in a natural area. [View fullsize![Image 7: CheastyNorthSouthAerial PNG.png](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5d5345ed2ee2de0001da5876/1664490178694-M1RHP1PXJUVXAP8F2DPY/CheastyNorthSouthAerial+PNG.png?format=1000w)](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5d5345ed2ee2de0001da5876/1664490178694-M1RHP1PXJUVXAP8F2DPY/CheastyNorthSouthAerial+PNG.png). Cheasty Trails and Bike Park: [https://www.facebook.com/cheastytrails/](https://www.facebook.com/cheastytrails/). Friends of Cheasty Mt. View: [https://www.facebook.com/CheastyMtView/](https://www.facebook.com/CheastyMtView/). Seattle Parks and Recreation: [Project Site](http://www.seattle.gov/parks/about-us/current-projects/cheasty-mountain-bike/pedestrian-trail-pilot-project). [Download Trail Map](https://www.dropbox.com/s/rce6a0gahfhw1wa/CheastyNorthSouthAerial.pdf?dl=0). [![Image 8](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5d5345ed2ee2de0001da5876/9b83a62c-334d-4003-b3cc-7b323643fa1d/Screen+Shot+2023-12-08+at+4.36.43+PM.png)](https://www.bonfire.com/store/cheasty/). [Cheasty Store](https://www.bonfire.com/store/cheasty/). Evergreen Mountain Bike Alliance is leading the trail building for Cheasty’s mountain bike trail construction. The project is heavily driven by volunteers, so please come out and help build Seattle’s first forested mountain bike park. [View Trail Building Work Parties](https://www.evergreenmtb.org/calendar/work-parties). Our Green Seattle Partnership forest stewards lead restoration and trail building work parties twice per month in different parts of the woods. [View Restoration Work Parties](https://seattle.greencitypartnerships.org/event/map/?search=cheasty&organization=seattle&park=&start=&end=). [donate](https://www.seattleparksfoundation.org/project/cheasty-trails-and-bike-park/).
